name: schemastud/laravel-beam-notifications
description: The notify capability of the schemastud beam family: a beam can notify. Owns the x-beam-notify keyword and the submission -> notify wiring, synthesizing one generic BeamNotification from the keyword (overridable by a host FQCN) to typed recipients (to / to_roles / to_teams). Consumes rushing/laravel-notification-status for delivery tracking with zero coupling and reuses Laravel's channels + Notifiable; the central relay is a satellite-registered custom channel, not shipped here.

suggest.rushing/laravel-notification-status: Durable pending/sent/failed/given_up delivery ledger with retry + replay. Consumed automatically through Laravel's native notification events — no wiring needed.
suggest.schemastud/laravel-beam-accounts: Resolves the to_roles / to_teams recipient keys (roles enum + team membership). Without it, only the address-only `to:` key works; to_roles/to_teams throw a clear boot/first-send error.
